Container.Name: tunnelo-agent
Container.Overview:
Tunnelo gives your Jellyfin server a public https://your-name.tunnelo.io address with no port forwarding, no dynamic DNS, and no reverse proxy setup. This agent keeps an outbound WireGuard tunnel to the Tunnelo gateway and relays only your Jellyfin port over it.
Requirements: NET_ADMIN capability and /dev/net/tun (preset in this template) so the agent can create its WireGuard interface. It works without the kernel WireGuard module by falling back to userspace wireguard-go.
Setup: paste the token from your Tunnelo dashboard and point Jellyfin URL at your Jellyfin container (usually http://SERVER-IP:8096).

Config.Name: Tunnelo token
Config.Description: One-time setup token from your Tunnelo dashboard. Only needed until the first successful registration.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Where the agent can reach your Jellyfin server. Use your Unraid server's LAN IP and Jellyfin's port, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8096.

Config.Name: Agent state
Config.Description: Stores the agent's credentials and WireGuard private key. Keep it on appdata so re-creating the container keeps your registration.
